title: Mock Exam G
description: A 22-task RHCSA9 mock exam covering persistent networking, repositories, users, services, storage, NFS, SSH, and rootless containers across client and server.

tasks: On client, recover root access from the console and set the root password to cinder9.

On client, configure persistent IPv4 networking.

IP address: 192.168.122.46/24
Gateway: 192.168.122.1
DNS: 192.168.122.3
Hostname: client-g.exam9.lab
On client, configure enabled BaseOS and AppStream repositories from http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and http://server/repo/AppStream/ with GPG checks disabled.
On client, install tree from the configured repositories and remove dos2unix if it is installed.
On client, create group opsg9. Create users anag9, devg9, and auditg9; auditg9 must use /sbin/nologin. Set each password to cinder9 and add anag9 and devg9 to opsg9.
On client, set maximum password age 60 days and warning period 7 days for anag9. Allow members of opsg9 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On client, create /srv/opsg9 owned by root:opsg9 with permissions 2770 and a default ACL granting opsg9 full access.
On client, create executable script /usr/local/bin/report-g9 that writes glacier iris report and the active state of sshd, chronyd, and firewalld to /root/report-g9.txt.
On client, create a 512 MiB swap file at /swapg9, activate it immediately, and make it persistent.
On client, create volume group vgg9 on /dev/sdb, create logical volume datag9 with size 320 MiB, format it as XFS, and mount it persistently at /mnt/datag9.
On client, create user podg9, enable lingering for that user, and run a rootless container named webg9 from localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest.

On server, configure persistent IPv4 networking.

IP address: 192.168.122.3/24
Gateway: 192.168.122.1
DNS: 192.168.122.3
Hostname: server-g.exam9.lab
On server, configure enabled BaseOS and AppStream repositories from http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and http://server/repo/AppStream/ with GPG checks disabled.
On server, create group srvg9, create user svcg9 with password cinder9, add svcg9 to srvg9, and allow srvg9 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On server, publish /var/www/html/exam-g.html containing glacier status web, configure httpd to listen on TCP port 8306, label the port for httpd, and open it permanently in firewalld.
On server, enable persistent systemd journal storage and restart systemd-journald.
On server, schedule a root cron job that runs every 11 minutes and appends glacier monitor cron to /var/log/auditg9.log.
On server, set the default boot target to multi-user.target and create /srv/server-g9 owned by root:srvg9 with permissions 2770.
On server, export /exports/rhcsa9-g to 192.168.122.0/24 with a README containing glacier project export. On client, mount server:/exports/rhcsa9-g persistently at /mnt/rhcsa9-g.
On server, create user copyg9 with password cinder9. On client, configure key-based SSH login for root to copyg9@server.
On client, create /root/exam-g-copy.txt containing glacier courier transfer and copy it to server:/home/copyg9/exam-g-copy.txt.
On server, enable chronyd for the lab network. On client, configure chronyd to use server as its only time source.
solution_commands: # At the boot menu, edit the selected kernel entry.
# Append rw init=/bin/bash to the linux line and boot with Ctrl+x.
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.46/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
for service in sshd chronyd firewalld; do
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.3/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
checks: echo cinder9 | su - root -c 'whoami' 2>/dev/null | grep -qx root

hostnamectl --static | grep -qx client-g.exam9.lab && CONN="System eth1"; nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.46/24 && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.1 && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fq 192.168.122.3

test -f /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '^baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/?$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '^baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/?$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && [ "$(grep -Ec '^enabled=1$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ] && [ "$(grep -Ec '^gpgcheck=0$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ]
rpm -q tree >/dev/null

getent group opsg9 >/dev/null && id -nG anag9 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsg9 && id -nG devg9 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsg9 && getent passwd auditg9 | awk -F: '$7 == "/sbin/nologin" {found=1} END {exit !found}'

chage -l anag9 | grep -Eq 'Maximum.*60' && chage -l anag9 | grep -Eq 'warning.*7' && grep -Eq '^%opsg9[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$' /etc/sudoers.d/opsg9-systemctl
stat -c '%U:%G:%a' /srv/opsg9 | grep -qx root:opsg9:2770 && getfacl -p /srv/opsg9 | grep -Eq '^default:group:opsg9:rwx$'
test -x /usr/local/bin/report-g9 && /usr/local/bin/report-g9 >/dev/null && grep -Fxq 'glacier iris report' /root/report-g9.txt
swapon --show=NAME --noheadings | grep -qx '/swapg9' && awk '$1 == "/swapg9" && $2 == "swap" && $3 == "swap" {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
lvs /dev/vgg9/datag9 >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET /mnt/datag9 | grep -qx /mnt/datag9 && awk '$2 == "/mnt/datag9" && $3 == "xfs" {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
runuser -l podg9 -c 'podman ps --format {{.Names}}' | grep -qx webg9 && loginctl show-user podg9 | grep -Eq '^Linger=yes$'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; hostnamectl --static | grep -qx server-g.exam9.lab && CONN="System eth1"; nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.3/24 && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.1 && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fq 192.168.122.3'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -f /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '"'"'^baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/?$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '"'"'^baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/?$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && [ "$(grep -Ec '"'"'^enabled=1$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ] && [ "$(grep -Ec '"'"'^gpgcheck=0$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ]'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group srvg9 >/dev/null && id -nG svcg9 | tr '"'"' '"'"' '"'"'\n'"'"' | grep -qx srvg9 && grep -Eq '"'"'^%srvg9[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/srvg9-systemctl'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq '"'"'glacier status web'"'"' /var/www/html/exam-g.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8306$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-g.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8306([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8306/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; files=""; test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && files=$(find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '"'"'/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf'"'"' \) -type f 2>/dev/null); test -n "$files" && awk '"'"'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' $files'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -x /usr/local/sbin/auditg9.sh && grep -Fxq '"'"'*/11 * * * * root /usr/local/sbin/auditg9.sh'"'"' /etc/cron.d/auditg9 && grep -Fxq "echo '"'"'glacier monitor cron'"'"' >> /var/log/auditg9.log" /usr/local/sbin/auditg9.sh && systemctl is-enabled crond | grep -qx enabled'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl get-default | grep -qx multi-user.target && stat -c '"'"'%U:%G:%a'"'"' /srv/server-g9 | grep -qx root:srvg9:2770'

findmnt -no SOURCE,TARGET /mnt/rhcsa9-g | grep -qx 'server:/exports/rhcsa9-g /mnt/rhcsa9-g' && grep -Eq '^server:/exports/rhcsa9-g[[:space:]]+/mnt/rhcsa9-g[[:space:]]+nfs([[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq "glacier project export" /exports/rhcsa9-g/README && grep -Eq "^/exports/rhcsa9-g[[:space:]]+192\\.168\\.122\\.0/24" /etc/exports.d/rhcsa9-g.exports && systemctl is-active nfs-server | grep -qx active'
runuser -l root -c 'ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o NumberOfPasswordPrompts=0 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null copyg9@server true'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq '"'"'glacier courier transfer'"'"' /home/copyg9/exam-g-copy.txt'

grep -Eq '^server[[:space:]]+server[[:space:]]+iburst$' /etc/chrony.conf && systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active'
